title: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Pro - Ethernet Surge Protector, outdoor
description: Ubiquiti UACC-ETH-SP-Pro is a surge protector from Ubiquiti designed for outdoor units. It provides effective device protection (including PoE-powered devices) with connection speeds of up to 10 Gbps . It redirects harmful electrostatic discharges and surges directly into the UACC-ETH-SP-Pro, ensuring safe grounding. Your network devices will always remain protected The UACC-ETH-SP-Pro surge protector is equipped with two RJ-45 ports (input + output) and supports PoE power passthrough The first generation offered protection against peak currents of 5kA, the second generation increased this to 10kA, and the Pro version offers protection of up to 20kA !
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Gigabit LAN Yes
